name: Gx
description: 4HP gate expander for the Metropolix sequencer. Connects via ribbon cable and provides 8 additional gate/trigger outputs — 4 per track — for accessing all Metropolix gate lanes.

outputs.name: T1 Gate 1
outputs.description: Gate output for Metropolix Track 1, Gate Lane 1.

outputs.name: T1 Gate 2
outputs.description: Gate output for Metropolix Track 1, Gate Lane 2.

outputs.name: T1 Gate 3
outputs.description: Gate output for Metropolix Track 1, Gate Lane 3.

outputs.name: T1 Gate 4
outputs.description: Gate output for Metropolix Track 1, Gate Lane 4.

outputs.name: T2 Gate 1
outputs.description: Gate output for Metropolix Track 2, Gate Lane 1.

outputs.name: T2 Gate 2
outputs.description: Gate output for Metropolix Track 2, Gate Lane 2.

outputs.name: T2 Gate 3
outputs.description: Gate output for Metropolix Track 2, Gate Lane 3.

outputs.name: T2 Gate 4
outputs.description: Gate output for Metropolix Track 2, Gate Lane 4.

behaviors.name: Passive Expander
behaviors.description: Connects to Metropolix via a 10-pin ribbon cable on the back. No configuration needed — Gx automatically mirrors Metropolix gate lanes to its outputs.

behaviors.name: Gate Lane Access
behaviors.description: Exposes all 4 gate lanes per track that are configured in Metropolix. Gate patterns, ratchets, and mutes follow Metropolix programming exactly.

patchIdeas.name: Polyrhythmic drums
patchIdeas.patch: T1 Gates 1–4 → drum triggers · T2 Gates 1–4 → additional percussion voices · different patterns per lane

patchIdeas.name: Envelope stacking
patchIdeas.patch: Multiple gate lanes → multiple envelope inputs · layered attacks on a single voice

patchIdeas.name: Rhythmic modulation
patchIdeas.patch: Gate lanes → trigger inputs on function generators for rhythmic CV modulation synchronized to Metropolix
